title: miliusa traceyi
intro: Miliusa traceyi, also known as the Tractley's Miliusa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Miliusa traceyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and congestion, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Miliusa traceyi can be found in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
